figures.caption: Figure 2: The figures show (a) mean test R2 and standard deviation for N |θ| =0.64 over 30 runs of all the algorithms, (b) test R2 over varying N |θ| by changing total number of samples available across all clients,(c) test R2 at ηϕ = 0.85 for varying ηθ̃, and (d) test R2 at ηθ̃ = 0.25 for varying ηϕ.

Figure 4: The figure shows a) Test accuracy over epochs at 99.9% sparsity at N |θ| ∼0.02 at a fixed data/split seed and 30 different run seeds and b) Test accuracy over epochs at 99.9% sparsity at N |θ| ∼0.02 at a fixed run seed and 30 different data/split seeds.
